command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
echo '=CANONICAL_JOB_SEARCH='
find memory/ -name '*.json' 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l 'phase9e10\|9e10\|9E10\|9E.10\|candidate\|9e.10\|03cfe2\|20260621' 2>/dev/null
echo '=ACTIVE_DIR='
ls memory/operator/active/ 2>/dev/null
echo '=PHASE_CTRL_DIR='
ls memory/phase-controller/ 2>/dev/null
echo '=PHASE_ADV_DIR='
ls memory/phase-advancement/ 2>/dev/null
echo '=GOVERNED_DIR='
ls memory/execution-pipeline/governed/ 2>/dev/null
echo '=OPERATOR_RUNTIME_HEAD='
head -100 runtime/operator_runtime.py
echo '=GOVERNED_EXECUTOR_HEAD='
head -60 runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py
echo '=BRIDGE_HEAD='
head -60 runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py
ENDSSH
